TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_mukan, title = mukan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/mukan} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:еҗғ) manamuh mukan tu paza' ku ungay. зҢҙеӯҗж„ӣеҗғйҰҷи•ү.
S.PHON: (kamu nu Д§ur~Йҫam:*) manamuД§ mukan tu pazaК”~КЎ ku uЕӢaj. ******.
S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:еҗғ) manamuh mukan tu paza' ku ungay. зҢҙеӯҗж„ӣеҗғйҰҷи•ү.
S.PHON: (kamu nu Д§ur~Йҫam:*) manamuД§ mukan tu pazaК”~КЎ ku uЕӢaj. ******.
